news.title:
Wipro to announce Q4FY26 results on April 16; brokerages predict muted performance due to wage hikes and integration costs.
Nuvama expects 9% YoY profit decline; Kotak projects 3% rise. Revenue growth driven by Harman acquisition and FX benefits.
news.summary:
Wipro to announce Q4FY26 results on April 16; brokerages predict muted performance due to wage hikes and integration costs.
Nuvama expects 9% YoY profit decline; Kotak projects 3% rise. Revenue growth driven by Harman acquisition and FX benefits.

news.summary: Nifty crosses 23,100 led by gains in Wipro, HCLTech, and Hindalco.

news.title:
Markets decline as Trump's Iran deadline looms; Nifty falls below 22,800, Sensex down 698 points, crude oil surges to $115.
Hindalco and Wipro gain on Nifty; broader markets see losses led by IndiGo, Eicher Motors, and Adani Enterprises.
news.summary:
Markets decline as Trump's Iran deadline looms; Nifty falls below 22,800, Sensex down 698 points, crude oil surges to $115.
Hindalco and Wipro gain on Nifty; broader markets see losses led by IndiGo, Eicher Motors, and Adani Enterprises.

news.title:
Experts recommend 6 stocks for the short term, including Axis Bank, Nykaa, Coal India, Wipro, Trent, and CCL Products.
Key targets: Axis Bank (₹1,343-1,365), Nykaa (₹275-282), Coal India (₹500), Wipro (₹220), Trent (₹4,100), CCL (₹1,210-1,240).

news.title:
Investec suggests Wipro may consider a Rs 16,000 crore share buyback.
This indicates potential capital return and focus on shareholder value.
news.summary:

news.title:
Wipro shares rose 1.8% to ₹198.49 on a $1B Olam deal and Mindsprint acquisition.
The deal bolsters Wipro's agri-tech presence; stock down 25.7% YTD, underperforming Nifty.
news.summary:
Wipro shares rose 1.8% to ₹198.49 on a $1B Olam deal and Mindsprint acquisition.
The deal bolsters Wipro's agri-tech presence; stock down 25.7% YTD, underperforming Nifty.

news.title:
Wipro wins 8-year contract with Olam Group worth $1B; $800M committed.
Olam Group, majority owned by Temasek, valued at over $50B.
news.summary:

Olam Group, majority owned by Temasek, valued at over $50B.

news.title:
Wipro signs definitive agreement to acquire 100% stake in Mindsprint Pte. Ltd.
The $375M deal aims to strengthen Olam Group partnership, expected completion by June 30, 2026.
news.summary:

news.title:
Wipro's Board to meet on April 15-16, 2026, to approve Q4 and FY26 financials.
Trading window for Wipro closed from March 16 to April 18, 2026.

The new unit aims to boost growth; senior leadership appointments announced.

news.title:
Wipro announces senior management changes effective April 1, 2026.
Nagendra Bandaru becomes CEO of AI Platforms; Kanwar Singh to lead Technology Services GBLs.
news.summary:

news.title:
TCS to announce Q4FY26 results on April 9, recommend final dividend for FY26; interim dividend totals Rs 33.
Wipro to declare FY26 results post-market on April 21; interim dividend to date Rs 11 per share.
news.summary:

news.title:
Wipro completes merger of Rizing Consulting USA LLC with Rizing LLC, effective March 31, 2026.
The merger aims to rationalize and consolidate Wipro's group structure; no changes in shareholding pattern.
news.summary:

news.title:
India's revised buyback taxation, effective April 2026, reduces tax rates to 12.5%, likely reviving IT firms' buyback activity.
Wipro, with Rs 57,000 crore cash and high payout ratios, may lead buybacks post-rule change, analysts predict.
news.summary:
India's revised buyback taxation, effective April 2026, reduces tax rates to 12.5%, likely reviving IT firms' buyback activity.
Wipro, with Rs 57,000 crore cash and high payout ratios, may lead buybacks post-rule change, analysts predict.

news.title:
Wipro gains 1.15% to Rs 189.69 after expanding operations in South Korea, launching an innovation lab in Seoul.
The lab supports AI-led solutions for technology, automotive, and industrial sectors, enhancing local and global capabilities.
news.summary:
